title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CANAUILI BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CANAUILI, MUNICIPALITY OF JANIUAY, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO MANUEL A. AARON MEMORIAL BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 33264

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7604, June 03, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CANAUILI BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CANAUILI, MUNICIPALITY OF JANIUAY, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO MANUEL A. AARON MEMORIAL BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Canauili Barangay High School in Barangay Canauili, Municipality of Janiuay, Province of Iloilo, is hereby changed to Manuel A. Aaron Memorial Barangay High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 26, 1991 and February 6, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: June 03, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
